title: A 35-year-old ‘crypto bro’ helped Pakistan win over Trump’s world
summary_full: The prestigious guest list made the event look more like a state visit than a ceremony for a non-binding stablecoin agreement that is exploratory in nature and doesn’t involve a major financial commitment. A group photo showed the 32-year-old son of Trump adviser Steve Witkoff flanked by Pakistani PM Shehbaz Sharif and Field Marshal Asim Munir.
